message:
Add language runtimes installer library (scripts/lib/languages.sh)

Implements modular language runtime installation for ACFS:
- install_bun(): Bun JavaScript/TypeScript runtime
- install_uv(): uv Python package manager
- install_rust(): Rust via rustup
- install_go(): Go via apt or latest from go.dev
- verify_languages(): Verification function for all runtimes
- get_language_versions(): Version reporting for doctor output

Features:
- Idempotent (safe to run multiple times)
- Supports arm64 and amd64 architectures
- Follows cli_tools.sh patterns for consistency
- Can be sourced as library or run standalone

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

 {"id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-5m6.2","title":"Create OS detection library (scripts/lib/os_detect.sh)","description":"# Task: Create OS Detection Library

## Description
Build a library to detect and validate the target OS.

## Requirements
- Detect Ubuntu version (24.04, 25.x)
- Detect architecture (amd64, arm64)
- Fail gracefully on unsupported OS
- Provide useful error messages

## Functions

```bash
detect_os()          # Returns: ubuntu
detect_version()     # Returns: 25.04
detect_codename()    # Returns: plucky
detect_arch()        # Returns: amd64 or arm64
validate_os()        # Exit 1 if unsupported
```

## Supported Configurations
- Ubuntu 24.04 LTS (noble)
- Ubuntu 25.04 (plucky)
- Ubuntu 25.10 (future)
- Architectures: amd64, arm64

## Implementation

```bash
#!/bin/bash
# scripts/lib/os_detect.sh

detect_os() {
    if [[ -f /etc/os-release ]]; then
        . /etc/os-release
        echo "$ID"
    else
        echo "unknown"
    fi
}

validate_os() {
    local os=$(detect_os)
    local version=$(detect_version)
    
    if [[ "$os" != "ubuntu" ]]; then
        log_error "ACFS requires Ubuntu. Detected: $os"
        exit 1
    fi
    
    # Check version >= 24.04
    if [[ "${version%.*}" -lt 24 ]]; then
        log_error "ACFS requires Ubuntu 24.04 or later. Detected: $version"
        exit 1
    fi
}
```

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Correctly detects Ubuntu versions
- [ ] Detects arm64 vs amd64
- [ ] Clear error on unsupported OS
- [ ] Works on fresh Ubuntu VPS","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-19T22:24:30.433099-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-19T23:23:59.346095-05:00","closed_at":"2025-12-19T23:23:59.346095-05:00","close_reason":"Files created in previous session: scripts/lib/logging.sh, os_detect.sh, user.sh, zsh.sh, and install.sh with all 8 phases","labels":["installer","task"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-5m6.2","depends_on_id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-5m6","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-12-19T22:24:30.435198-05:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}
 {"id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-5m6.3","title":"Create user normalization library (scripts/lib/user.sh)","description":"# Task: Create User Normalization Library

## Description
Build a library to ensure the ubuntu user exists with correct configuration.

## Requirements
- Create ubuntu user if missing
- Set up passwordless sudo
- Copy SSH authorized_keys from root
- Set zsh as default shell (after zsh installed)

## Functions

```bash
ensure_ubuntu_user()     # Create user if missing
setup_passwordless_sudo() # Write sudoers.d file
copy_ssh_keys()          # From root to ubuntu
set_default_shell()      # Change to zsh
```

## Sudoers Configuration
File: `/etc/sudoers.d/90-ubuntu-acfs`
```
ubuntu ALL=(ALL) NOPASSWD:ALL
```

## SSH Key Handling
If running as root:
1. Check /root/.ssh/authorized_keys exists
2. Create /home/ubuntu/.ssh/ if needed
3. Copy authorized_keys
4. Fix permissions (700, 600)
5. Set ownership to ubuntu:ubuntu

## Groups
Add ubuntu to:
- sudo
- docker (after docker installed)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Creates ubuntu user if missing
- [ ] Passwordless sudo works
- [ ] SSH keys copied from root
- [ ] Correct file permissions
- [ ] Works when run as root or ubuntu
- [ ] Idempotent (safe to run twice)","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-19T22:24:42.426684-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-19T23:23:59.346616-05:00","closed_at":"2025-12-19T23:23:59.346616-05:00","close_reason":"Files created in previous session: scripts/lib/logging.sh, os_detect.sh, user.sh, zsh.sh, and install.sh with all 8 phases","labels":["installer","task"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-5m6.3","depends_on_id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-5m6","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-12-19T22:24:42.428514-05:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}
 {"id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-5m6.4","title":"Create shell setup library (scripts/lib/zsh.sh)","description":"# Task: Create Shell Setup Library

## Description
Build a library to install and configure the complete shell environment.

## Components
1. zsh installation
2. Oh My Zsh installation
3. Powerlevel10k theme
4. Plugins installation
5. ACFS zshrc deployment

## Functions

```bash
install_zsh()              # apt install zsh
install_oh_my_zsh()        # Official installer
install_powerlevel10k()    # Clone to custom themes
install_zsh_plugins()      # Clone plugins
deploy_acfs_zshrc()        # Copy acfs.zshrc
configure_zshrc()          # Set up loader
```

## Plugins to Install
- zsh-autosuggestions
- zsh-syntax-highlighting
- docker
- docker-compose
- sudo
- colored-man-pages
- command-not-found
- git (built-in)

## File Layout
```
~/.acfs/
├── zsh/
│   └── acfs.zshrc     # Main config
└── ...

~/.zshrc                # Tiny loader
~/.zshrc.local          # User overrides (touch)
~/.p10k.zsh             # Theme config
```

## zshrc Loader Content
```bash
# ACFS loader
source "$HOME/.acfs/zsh/acfs.zshrc"
[ -f "$HOME/.zshrc.local" ] && source "$HOME/.zshrc.local"
```

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] zsh installed and working
- [ ] Oh My Zsh installed
- [ ] Powerlevel10k theme active
- [ ] All plugins installed
- [ ] acfs.zshrc deployed
- [ ] Loader .zshrc in place
- [ ] User overrides supported","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-19T22:24:55.348206-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-19T23:23:59.346999-05:00","closed_at":"2025-12-19T23:23:59.346999-05:00","close_reason":"Files created in previous session: scripts/lib/logging.sh, os_detect.sh, user.sh, zsh.sh, and install.sh with all 8 phases","labels":["installer","task"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-5m6.4","depends_on_id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-5m6","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-12-19T22:24:55.350105-05:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}

## Description
Build a library to install all required language runtimes.

## Languages to Install

### Bun
```bash
curl -fsSL https://bun.sh/install | bash
```
- Add to PATH: ~/.bun/bin
- Install completions

### uv (Python)
```bash
curl -LsSf https://astral.sh/uv/install.sh | sh
```
- Installs to ~/.local/bin
- Set UV_LINK_MODE=copy

### Rust
```bash
curl https://sh.rustup.rs -sSf | sh -s -- -y
```
- Adds ~/.cargo/bin to PATH
- Non-interactive install

### Go
```bash
sudo apt install -y golang-go
```
- Or latest from go.dev if needed

## Functions

```bash
install_bun()     # Bun runtime
install_uv()      # uv Python tooling
install_rust()    # Rust + cargo
install_go()      # Go toolchain
verify_languages() # Check all installed
```

## Verification

```bash
bun --version
uv --version
cargo --version
go version
```

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All 4 languages installed
- [ ] All in PATH
- [ ] Verification commands pass
- [ ] Idempotent (safe to run twice)
- [ ] Works on arm64 and amd64","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-19T22:25:06.994349-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-19T22:25:06.994349-05:00","labels":["installer","task"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-5m6.5","depends_on_id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-5m6","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-12-19T22:25:06.996068-05:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}

 {"id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-5m6.6","title":"Create coding agents installer (scripts/lib/agents.sh)","description":"# Task: Create Coding Agents Installer

## Description
Build a library to install the three coding agent CLIs.

## Agents to Install

### Claude Code
```bash
# Official installer (check docs for latest)
curl -fsSL https://claude.ai/install.sh | bash
# Or via installer script
```
- Installs to ~/.local/bin/claude
- Requires login after install

### Codex CLI (OpenAI)
```bash
bun install -g @openai/codex@latest
```
- Installed via bun global
- Requires API key or login

### Gemini CLI (Google)
```bash
bun install -g @google/gemini-cli@latest
```
- Installed via bun global
- Requires login

## Aliases
These are set in acfs.zshrc:
```bash
alias cc='NODE_OPTIONS="--max-old-space-size=32768" ENABLE_BACKGROUND_TASKS=1 claude --dangerously-skip-permissions'
alias cod='codex --dangerously-bypass-approvals-and-sandbox -m gpt-5.2-codex -c model_reasoning_effort="xhigh" -c model_reasoning_summary_format=experimental --enable web_search_request'
alias gmi='gemini --yolo --model gemini-3-pro-preview'
```

## Functions

```bash
install_claude_code()  # Install Claude CLI
install_codex_cli()    # Install Codex CLI
install_gemini_cli()   # Install Gemini CLI
verify_agents()        # Check all installed
```

## Note
These require login after install - that happens in onboarding.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All 3 agents installed
- [ ] Commands available in PATH
- [ ] Aliases configured in zshrc
- [ ] Verification commands work
- [ ] Clear message about login requirement","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-19T22:25:22.66693-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-19T22:25:22.66693-05:00","labels":["installer","task"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-5m6.6","depends_on_id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-5m6","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-12-19T22:25:22.668571-05:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}
 {"id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-5m6.7","title":"Create Dicklesworthstone stack installer (scripts/lib/stack.sh)","description":"# Task: Create Dicklesworthstone Stack Installer

## Description
Build a library to install all 8 Dicklesworthstone tools.

## Tools to Install (in order)

### 1. NTM (Named Tmux Manager)
```bash
curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Dicklesworthstone/ntm/main/install.sh | bash
```
- Agent orchestration cockpit
- Verify: `ntm --help`

### 2. MCP Agent Mail
```bash
curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Dicklesworthstone/mcp_agent_mail/main/scripts/install.sh | bash -s -- --yes
```
- Agent coordination server
- Verify: `command -v am`

### 3. Ultimate Bug Scanner (UBS)
```bash
curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Dicklesworthstone/ultimate_bug_scanner/master/install.sh | bash -s -- --easy-mode
```
- Bug scanning with guardrails
- Verify: `ubs --help`

### 4. Beads Viewer (BV)
```bash
curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Dicklesworthstone/beads_viewer/main/install.sh | bash
```
- Task management TUI
- Verify: `bv --help`

### 5. CASS (Coding Agent Session Search)
```bash
curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Dicklesworthstone/coding_agent_session_search/main/install.sh | bash -s -- --easy-mode --verify
```
- Unified session search
- Verify: `cass --help`

### 6. CM (CASS Memory System)
```bash
curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Dicklesworthstone/cass_memory_system/main/install.sh | bash -s -- --easy-mode --verify
```
- Procedural memory for agents
- Verify: `cm --version`

### 7. CAAM (Coding Agent Account Manager)
```bash
curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Dicklesworthstone/coding_agent_account_manager/main/install.sh | bash
```
- Auth switching
- Verify: `caam --help`

### 8. SLB (Simultaneous Launch Button)
```bash
curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Dicklesworthstone/slb/main/scripts/install.sh | bash
```
- Two-person rule for dangerous commands
- Verify: `slb --help`

## Functions

```bash
install_ntm()
install_mcp_agent_mail()
install_ubs()
install_bv()
install_cass()
install_cm()
install_caam()
install_slb()
verify_stack()  # Check all 8 installed
```

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All 8 tools installed
- [ ] All commands in PATH
- [ ] All verify commands pass
- [ ] Idempotent installation","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-19T22:25:40.15948-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-19T22:25:40.15948-05:00","labels":["installer","task"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-5m6.7","depends_on_id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-5m6","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-12-19T22:25:40.161715-05:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}
 {"id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-5m6.8","title":"Create main install.sh orchestrator","description":"# Task: Create Main install.sh Orchestrator

## Description
Build the main installer script that orchestrates all phases.

## Script Structure

```bash
#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail

# Parse arguments
parse_args() {
    while [[ $# -gt 0 ]]; do
        case $1 in
            --yes) ACFS_AUTO_APPROVE=1 ;;
            --mode) ACFS_MODE="$2"; shift ;;
            --dry-run) ACFS_DRY_RUN=1 ;;
            --quiet) ACFS_QUIET=1 ;;
            --verbose) ACFS_VERBOSE=1 ;;
            *) log_error "Unknown option: $1"; exit 1 ;;
        esac
        shift
    done
}

# Main phases
main() {
    log_step "0/8" "Preflight checks"
    source_libs
    validate_os
    
    log_step "1/8" "Setting up ubuntu user"
    ensure_ubuntu_user
    setup_passwordless_sudo
    
    log_step "2/8" "Creating workspace"
    create_workspace
    
    log_step "3/8" "Installing shell environment"
    install_zsh_environment
    
    log_step "4/8" "Installing languages"
    install_languages
    
    log_step "5/8" "Installing dev tools"
    install_dev_tools
    
    log_step "6/8" "Installing coding agents"
    install_agents
    
    log_step "7/8" "Installing Dicklesworthstone stack"
    install_stack
    
    log_step "8/8" "Final configuration"
    deploy_configs
    install_onboard
    
    print_completion_message
}

main "$@"
```

## Error Handling
- Trap errors with helpful message
- Log to file before exit
- Suggest running acfs doctor

## Checkpointing
- Write completed phases to ~/.acfs/state.json
- Skip completed phases on re-run
- Support --force to re-run all

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All 8 phases implemented
- [ ] Clean error handling
- [ ] Checkpointing works
- [ ] --dry-run mode
- [ ] Completion message with next steps
- [ ] Works as root or ubuntu","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-19T22:25:56.003488-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-19T23:23:59.347345-05:00","closed_at":"2025-12-19T23:23:59.347345-05:00","close_reason":"Files created in previous session: scripts/lib/logging.sh, os_detect.sh, user.sh, zsh.sh, and install.sh with all 8 phases","labels":["installer","task"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-5m6.8","depends_on_id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-5m6","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-12-19T22:25:56.005402-05:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}

@@ -0,0 +1,421 @@
+#!/usr/bin/env bash
+# ============================================================
+# ACFS Installer - Language Runtimes Library
+# Installs Bun, uv (Python), Rust, and Go
+# ============================================================
+
+# Ensure we have logging functions available
+if [[ -z "${ACFS_BLUE:-}" ]]; then
+    SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
+    # shellcheck source=logging.sh
+    source "$SCRIPT_DIR/logging.sh"
+fi
+
+# ============================================================
+# Configuration
+# ============================================================
+
+# Version constraints (for documentation; installers fetch latest)
+# shellcheck disable=SC2034  # Used for reference
+declare -A LANGUAGE_VERSIONS=(
+    [bun]="latest"
+    [uv]="latest"
+    [rust]="stable"
+    [go]="system"  # apt package
+)
+
+# ============================================================
+# Helper Functions
+# ============================================================
+
+# Check if a command exists
+_lang_command_exists() {
+    command -v "$1" &>/dev/null
+}
+
+# Get the sudo command if needed
+_lang_get_sudo() {
+    if [[ $EUID -eq 0 ]]; then
+        echo ""
+    else
+        echo "sudo"
+    fi
+}
+
+# Run a command as target user
+_lang_run_as_user() {
+    local target_user="${TARGET_USER:-ubuntu}"
+    local target_home="${TARGET_HOME:-/home/$target_user}"
+    local cmd="$1"
+
+    if [[ "$(whoami)" == "$target_user" ]]; then
+        bash -c "$cmd"
+    else
+        $(_lang_get_sudo) -u "$target_user" -H bash -c "$cmd"
+    fi
+}
+
+# Ensure ~/.local/bin exists for target user
+_lang_ensure_local_bin() {
+    local target_user="${TARGET_USER:-ubuntu}"
+    local target_home="${TARGET_HOME:-/home/$target_user}"
+    local local_bin="$target_home/.local/bin"
+
+    if [[ ! -d "$local_bin" ]]; then
+        log_detail "Creating $local_bin"
+        _lang_run_as_user "mkdir -p '$local_bin'"
+    fi
+}
+
+# ============================================================
+# Bun Installation
+# ============================================================
+
+# Install Bun JavaScript/TypeScript runtime
+# Installs to ~/.bun/bin/bun
+install_bun() {
+    local target_user="${TARGET_USER:-ubuntu}"
+    local target_home="${TARGET_HOME:-/home/$target_user}"
+    local bun_dir="$target_home/.bun"
+    local bun_bin="$bun_dir/bin/bun"
+
+    # Check if already installed
+    if [[ -x "$bun_bin" ]]; then
+        log_detail "Bun already installed at $bun_bin"
+        return 0
+    fi
+
+    log_detail "Installing Bun for $target_user..."
+
+    # Run Bun installer as target user
+    if ! _lang_run_as_user 'curl -fsSL https://bun.sh/install | bash'; then
+        log_warn "Bun installation failed"
+        return 1
+    fi
+
+    # Verify installation
+    if [[ -x "$bun_bin" ]]; then
+        local version
+        version=$(_lang_run_as_user "$bun_bin --version" 2>/dev/null || echo "unknown")
+        log_success "Bun $version installed"
+        return 0
+    else
+        log_warn "Bun binary not found after installation"
+        return 1
+    fi
+}
+
+# Upgrade Bun to latest version
+upgrade_bun() {
+    local target_user="${TARGET_USER:-ubuntu}"
+    local target_home="${TARGET_HOME:-/home/$target_user}"
+    local bun_bin="$target_home/.bun/bin/bun"
+
+    if [[ ! -x "$bun_bin" ]]; then
+        log_warn "Bun not installed, installing instead"
+        install_bun
+        return $?
+    fi
+
+    log_detail "Upgrading Bun..."
+    _lang_run_as_user "$bun_bin upgrade" && log_success "Bun upgraded"
+}
+
+# ============================================================
+# uv Installation (Python tooling)
+# ============================================================
+
+# Install uv - extremely fast Python package manager
+# Installs to ~/.local/bin/uv
+install_uv() {
+    local target_user="${TARGET_USER:-ubuntu}"
+    local target_home="${TARGET_HOME:-/home/$target_user}"
+    local uv_bin="$target_home/.local/bin/uv"
+
+    # Check if already installed
+    if [[ -x "$uv_bin" ]]; then
+        log_detail "uv already installed at $uv_bin"
+        return 0
+    fi
+
+    log_detail "Installing uv for $target_user..."
+
+    # Ensure ~/.local/bin exists
+    _lang_ensure_local_bin
+
+    # Run uv installer as target user
+    if ! _lang_run_as_user 'curl -LsSf https://astral.sh/uv/install.sh | sh'; then
+        log_warn "uv installation failed"
+        return 1
+    fi
+
+    # Verify installation
+    if [[ -x "$uv_bin" ]]; then
+        local version
+        version=$(_lang_run_as_user "$uv_bin --version" 2>/dev/null || echo "unknown")
+        log_success "uv $version installed"
+        return 0
+    else
+        log_warn "uv binary not found after installation"
+        return 1
+    fi
+}
+
+# Configure uv environment variables
+configure_uv() {
+    local target_user="${TARGET_USER:-ubuntu}"
+    local target_home="${TARGET_HOME:-/home/$target_user}"
+
+    # UV_LINK_MODE=copy is recommended for Docker/VPS environments
+    # This will be set in acfs.zshrc, but log it for clarity
+    log_detail "uv configured with UV_LINK_MODE=copy (set in acfs.zshrc)"
+}
+
+# Upgrade uv to latest version
+upgrade_uv() {
+    local target_user="${TARGET_USER:-ubuntu}"
+    local target_home="${TARGET_HOME:-/home/$target_user}"
+    local uv_bin="$target_home/.local/bin/uv"
+
+    if [[ ! -x "$uv_bin" ]]; then
+        log_warn "uv not installed, installing instead"
+        install_uv
+        return $?
+    fi
+
+    log_detail "Upgrading uv..."
+    _lang_run_as_user "$uv_bin self update" && log_success "uv upgraded"
+}
+
+# ============================================================
+# Rust Installation
+# ============================================================
+
+# Install Rust via rustup
+# Installs to ~/.cargo/bin/
+install_rust() {
+    local target_user="${TARGET_USER:-ubuntu}"
+    local target_home="${TARGET_HOME:-/home/$target_user}"
+    local cargo_bin="$target_home/.cargo/bin/cargo"
+
+    # Check if already installed
+    if [[ -x "$cargo_bin" ]]; then
+        log_detail "Rust already installed at $cargo_bin"
+        return 0
+    fi
+
+    log_detail "Installing Rust for $target_user..."
+
+    # Run rustup installer as target user (-y for non-interactive)
+    if ! _lang_run_as_user 'curl https://sh.rustup.rs -sSf | sh -s -- -y'; then
+        log_warn "Rust installation failed"
+        return 1
+    fi
+
+    # Verify installation
+    if [[ -x "$cargo_bin" ]]; then
+        local version
+        version=$(_lang_run_as_user "$cargo_bin --version" 2>/dev/null || echo "unknown")
+        log_success "Rust $version installed"
+        return 0
+    else
+        log_warn "Cargo binary not found after installation"
+        return 1
+    fi
+}
+
+# Upgrade Rust to latest stable
+upgrade_rust() {
+    local target_user="${TARGET_USER:-ubuntu}"
+    local target_home="${TARGET_HOME:-/home/$target_user}"
+    local rustup_bin="$target_home/.cargo/bin/rustup"
+
+    if [[ ! -x "$rustup_bin" ]]; then
+        log_warn "Rust not installed, installing instead"
+        install_rust
+        return $?
+    fi
+
+    log_detail "Upgrading Rust..."
+    _lang_run_as_user "$rustup_bin update stable" && log_success "Rust upgraded"
+}
+
+# ============================================================
+# Go Installation
+# ============================================================
+
+# Install Go via apt (system package)
+# For latest version, use install_go_latest
+install_go() {
+    local sudo_cmd
+    sudo_cmd=$(_lang_get_sudo)
+
+    # Check if already installed
+    if _lang_command_exists go; then
+        log_detail "Go already installed"
+        return 0
+    fi
+
+    log_detail "Installing Go via apt..."
+
+    # Update package list and install
+    $sudo_cmd apt-get update -y >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
+
+    if $sudo_cmd apt-get install -y golang-go >/dev/null 2>&1; then
+        local version
+        version=$(go version 2>/dev/null | cut -d' ' -f3 || echo "unknown")
+        log_success "Go $version installed"
+        return 0
+    else
+        log_warn "Go installation via apt failed"
+        return 1
+    fi
+}
+
+# Install latest Go from go.dev (alternative to apt)
+install_go_latest() {
+    local sudo_cmd
+    sudo_cmd=$(_lang_get_sudo)
+
+    log_detail "Installing latest Go from go.dev..."
+
+    # Detect architecture
+    local arch
+    arch=$(uname -m)
+    case "$arch" in
+        x86_64) arch="amd64" ;;
+        aarch64|arm64) arch="arm64" ;;
+        *)
+            log_warn "Unsupported architecture for Go: $arch"
+            return 1
+            ;;
+    esac
+
+    # Get latest version
+    local version
+    version=$(curl -sL 'https://go.dev/VERSION?m=text' | head -1) || version="go1.23.4"
+
+    # Download and install
+    local tmpdir
+    tmpdir=$(mktemp -d)
+    local tarball="${version}.linux-${arch}.tar.gz"
+
+    log_detail "Downloading $tarball..."
+    if ! curl -fsSL "https://go.dev/dl/$tarball" -o "$tmpdir/$tarball"; then
+        log_warn "Failed to download Go"
+        rm -rf "$tmpdir"
+        return 1
+    fi
+
+    # Remove old installation and extract new one
+    $sudo_cmd rm -rf /usr/local/go
+    $sudo_cmd tar -C /usr/local -xzf "$tmpdir/$tarball"
+    rm -rf "$tmpdir"
+
+    # Create symlinks
+    $sudo_cmd ln -sf /usr/local/go/bin/go /usr/local/bin/go
+    $sudo_cmd ln -sf /usr/local/go/bin/gofmt /usr/local/bin/gofmt
+
+    local installed_version
+    installed_version=$(/usr/local/go/bin/go version 2>/dev/null | cut -d' ' -f3 || echo "unknown")
+    log_success "Go $installed_version installed"
+}
+
+# ============================================================
+# Verification Functions
+# ============================================================
+
+# Verify all language runtimes are installed
+verify_languages() {
+    local target_user="${TARGET_USER:-ubuntu}"
+    local target_home="${TARGET_HOME:-/home/$target_user}"
+    local all_pass=true
+
+    log_detail "Verifying language runtimes..."
+
+    # Check Bun
+    if [[ -x "$target_home/.bun/bin/bun" ]]; then
+        log_detail "  bun: $("$target_home"/.bun/bin/bun --version 2>/dev/null || echo 'installed')"
+    else
+        log_warn "  Missing: bun"
+        all_pass=false
+    fi
+
+    # Check uv
+    if [[ -x "$target_home/.local/bin/uv" ]]; then
+        log_detail "  uv: $("$target_home"/.local/bin/uv --version 2>/dev/null | head -1 || echo 'installed')"
+    else
+        log_warn "  Missing: uv"
+        all_pass=false
+    fi
+
+    # Check Rust/Cargo
+    if [[ -x "$target_home/.cargo/bin/cargo" ]]; then
+        log_detail "  cargo: $("$target_home"/.cargo/bin/cargo --version 2>/dev/null || echo 'installed')"
+    else
+        log_warn "  Missing: cargo (rust)"
+        all_pass=false
+    fi
+
+    # Check Go
+    if _lang_command_exists go; then
+        log_detail "  go: $(go version 2>/dev/null | cut -d' ' -f3 || echo 'installed')"
+    else
+        log_warn "  Missing: go"
+        all_pass=false
+    fi
+
+    if [[ "$all_pass" == "true" ]]; then
+        log_success "All language runtimes verified"
+        return 0
+    else
+        log_warn "Some language runtimes are missing"
+        return 1
+    fi
+}
+
+# Get versions of installed languages (for doctor output)
+get_language_versions() {
+    local target_user="${TARGET_USER:-ubuntu}"
+    local target_home="${TARGET_HOME:-/home/$target_user}"
+
+    echo "Language Runtime Versions:"
+
+    [[ -x "$target_home/.bun/bin/bun" ]] && echo "  bun: $("$target_home"/.bun/bin/bun --version 2>/dev/null)"
+    [[ -x "$target_home/.local/bin/uv" ]] && echo "  uv: $("$target_home"/.local/bin/uv --version 2>/dev/null | head -1)"
+    [[ -x "$target_home/.cargo/bin/cargo" ]] && echo "  cargo: $("$target_home"/.cargo/bin/cargo --version 2>/dev/null)"
+    [[ -x "$target_home/.cargo/bin/rustc" ]] && echo "  rustc: $("$target_home"/.cargo/bin/rustc --version 2>/dev/null)"
+    _lang_command_exists go && echo "  go: $(go version 2>/dev/null | cut -d' ' -f3)"
+}
+
+# ============================================================
+# Main Installation Function
+# ============================================================
+
+# Install all language runtimes (called by install.sh)
+install_all_languages() {
+    log_step "5/8" "Installing language runtimes..."
+
+    # Install each language runtime
+    install_bun
+    install_uv
+    install_rust
+    install_go
+
+    # Configure uv (sets environment variables)
+    configure_uv
+
+    # Verify installation
+    verify_languages
+
+    log_success "Language runtimes installation complete"
+}
+
+# ============================================================
+# Module can be sourced or run directly
+# ============================================================
+
+# If run directly (not sourced), execute main function
+if [[ "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}" == "${0}" ]]; then
+    install_all_languages "$@"
+fi
